abilities.name: punk-rock
abilities.description: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.

abilities.name: minus
abilities.description: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has plus or minus.

effectChanges.description: Powers up only when paired with plus.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

effectChanges.description: struggle is unaffected. helping hand and defense curl are not taken into account.
